name: Well of Many Worlds
description: This fine black cloth, soft as silk, is folded up to the dimensions of a handkerchief. It unfolds into a circular sheet 6 feet in diameter.

properties.appearance: Black cloth, soft as silk, folds to handkerchief size, unfolds to 6-foot diameter circle

portal_creation.effect: Unfold and place on solid surface to form two-way portal
portal_creation.destination: DM decides where it leads (another world or plane)

closing.effect: Take hold of cloth edges and fold it up to close

recharge.reuse: Can't open portal again for 1d8 hours
